Class VotingMethod

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.core.util.ExtensibleEnum
org.jscience.social.politics.VotingMethod
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ExtensibleEnum>
public final class VotingMethod extends ExtensibleEnum
An extensible enumeration for voting methods and election algorithms. Supporting standard social choice methods and dynamic custom algorithms.
Since:
2.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
See Also:

    • isBuiltIn

      public boolean isBuiltIn()
      Description copied from class: ExtensibleEnum
      Checks if this is a built-in (predefined) value. Default implementation returns true to mimic standard Enum behavior unless explicitly overridden.
      Overrides:
      isBuiltIn in class ExtensibleEnum
